note: No video bundler configured. Set EXTERNAL_VIDEO_WEBHOOK for production or BUNDLE_PROVIDER=ffmpeg (plus `npm i ffmpeg-static fluent-ffmpeg`) for local dev.
title: Alexander's Last Breath
hook: The man who conquered the world died whispering a dare.
script: On June 12, 323 BC, Alexander the Great lay fevered in Babylon, the empire he built crumbling with his fever. When his generals asked who inherits it all, the dying king grinned and said four words: to the strongest. Then he was gone. Chaos exploded for fifty years.
